method: Create a stacked area chart showing daily order totals segmented by campaign presence. Use time-based aggregation (day-level) on order_date, sum(order_total) for Y-axis, and color encoding for campaign/regular orders. Enable granular filtering via week/month selectors.
objective: Identify daily sales patterns and campaign impact alignment through continuous temporal visualization

method: Implement small multiples boxplot matrix with one box per delivery_status category. Encode order_total distribution through quartiles/outliers. Add mean markers and KPI annotations.
objective: Analyze value distributions across delivery performance categories to identify delay-related revenue impacts

method: Generate heatmap with weeks as rows and years as columns, colored by revenue percentiles. Overlay top 5 campaign markers using blinkit_marketing_performance.date for event annotations.
objective: Detect weekly seasonal peaks and correlate with marketing campaign timing

method: Design dual-axis line chart: left=monthly stock_received (bar), right=order_total (line). Implement brush selection for date ranges linked to inventory_view via shared time parameter.
objective: Reveal inventory replenishment patterns and their relationship to sales performance

method: Create horizon graph with product categories as rows, daily quantity sold as layered bands. Apply temporal smoothing to highlight persistent vs seasonal demand clusters.
objective: Identify product category sales clusters with similar temporal patterns

method: Calculate campaign ROAS residuals vs category average. Visualize as diverging bar chart colored by customer_segment with statistical confidence intervals.
objective: Quantify marketing effectiveness across different customer segments
